headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .182 / .357 / .364.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Minnesota Twins, KC 6, MIN 5. Noah Cameron led the night, working 6.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 0 walks. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.9 mph.

player_of_game.name: Noah Cameron
